summary: PR 2538 updates src/melee/if/ifprize.c for ifprize decomp progress. The diff replaces placeholder calls with recovered state-machine, object setup, text/audio/date display logic, refines local/global structs with HSD_JObj/HSD_GObj/HSD_Text and linked-list argument types, and adjusts inlining/stack-shaping around un_802FE3F8. Bot evidence reports two new function matches, two unmatched-function improvements, and one .data regression.

key_files.role: Only changed source file; contains recovered ifprize logic, struct layout refinements, object/text setup, and matching tactics.

what_changed.text: Introduced and moved struct un_802FEBE0_OnEnter_arg0 near the top of the file, adding x2 and typing x8 as a self-referential linked-list pointer.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: added struct un_802FEBE0_OnEnter_arg0 with x0, x2, x4, x8 pointer
raw_diff: removed later shorter struct definition with x0, x4, int x8

what_changed.text: Refined struct un_803F9D48 fields from padding/raw ints into typed HSD_JObj, HSD_GObj, HSD_Text, linked-list pointers, and an int x30[3] table.
Replaced pragma dont_inline around un_802FE3F8 with inline wrapper functions un_802FE3F8_inner and un_802FE3F8_noinline to affect call/inlining behavior for un_802FEBE0_OnEnter.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: added static inline un_802FE3F8_inner and un_802FE3F8_noinline
raw_diff comment: un_802FEBE0_OnEnter will inline un_802FE3F8 otherwise

what_changed.text: Recovered fn_802FE470 from placeholder calls into a state-driven update function that handles prize progression, input, cleanup of camera/light/ui GObjs, archive free, animation requests, and final state flags.
evidence_refs: bot_report: fn_802FE470 improved from 19.28% to 100.00%, +459 bytes

what_changed.text: Recovered un_802FE6A8 object setup to store camera/light/ui/text pointers in un_803F9D48, pass &un_803F9D48.x10 to lb_80011E24, mask two object class constants with & 0xFF, and scope GXColor/PAD_STACK inside a block.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: un_802FE6A8 stores x18, x1C, x14, x20, x24
raw_diff: block with GXColor color and PAD_STACK(0x14)
bot_report: un_802FE6A8 improved from 82.77% to 100.00%, +95 bytes

what_changed.text: Recovered most of un_802FE918, including audio selection, random index update, lookup through un_803F9B30/un_803F9A00, special-case display for a == 0x3E, localized date/time sprintf formats, and SisLib text output.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: un_802FE918 added locals, loops, HSD_Randi, gmMainLib_8015D8B0, HSD_SisLib calls, sprintf date formats
bot_report: un_802FE918 improved from 23.11% to 99.23%, +542 bytes

what_changed.text: Adjusted un_802FEBE0_OnEnter local types/order and calls un_802FE3F8_noinline with casts to short* for x6.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: un_802FEBE0_OnEnter removed PAD_STACK(8), changed arg0x0 type to int, reordered i initialization
bot_report: un_802FEBE0_OnEnter improved from 95.00% to 99.93%, +15 bytes

smart_moves.text: The PR turns anonymous padding and raw storage in un_803F9D48 into typed fields before using them in recovered functions, making object, text, and linked-list roles explicit within this TU.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: uses of x10/x14/x18/x1C/x20/x24/x28/x2C in fn_802FE470, un_802FE6A8, un_802FE918

smart_moves.text: The state-machine in fn_802FE470 is expressed as a switch over x1 rather than leaving sequential placeholder calls, which aligns the source with visible state transitions and cleanup behavior.
The temporary stack tactic in un_802FE6A8 is narrowed to an inner block around GXColor/text setup rather than left as broad function-level padding.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: added inner block with GXColor color and PAD_STACK(0x14)

decomp_lessons.text: When a global state struct begins carrying persistent object and UI handles across functions, replacing padding/raw ints with HSD_JObj, HSD_GObj, HSD_Text, and domain-specific pointer fields can unlock cleaner recovered logic and matching progress.
A short linked-list argument structure can be recovered from later traversal needs: x2 and self-pointer x8 are used by fn_802FE470 to process additional prize entries after the initial arg0.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: struct un_802FEBE0_OnEnter_arg0 adds x2 and self-pointer x8
raw_diff: fn_802FE470 uses x2C->x0/x2/x4 and advances x2C = x2C->x8

decomp_lessons.text: For MWCC-sensitive matching, replacing a broad dont_inline pragma with a narrow inline wrapper chain can steer inlining at one call site while avoiding a file-level pragma block.
evidence_refs: raw_diff comment: un_802FEBE0_OnEnter will inline un_802FE3F8 otherwise

decomp_lessons.text: Keep function-level success separate from data-section health: this PR's bot report shows code matches/improvements alongside a .data regression, so data movement or layout side effects need separate review rather than being hidden by text progress.
evidence_refs: bot_report: 2 new matches and 2 unmatched-item improvements

naming_conventions.text: Unproven file-local symbols keep address-style names such as un_803F9D48, un_802FE918, and fn_802FE470, while locals use role-based names where clear, such as gobj_camera, gobj_light, gobj_ui, jobj_ui, color, and new_x3.
Recovered struct fields remain offset-style x0/x2/x4/x8 and x10/x14/etc. rather than speculative semantic names, even when their C types are improved.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: struct un_803F9D48 typed fields retain xNN names

assembly_or_matching_tactics.text: Removed a pragma dont_inline block and introduced inline wrapper functions to prevent un_802FE3F8 from being inlined into un_802FEBE0_OnEnter.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: pragma removal and wrapper addition

assembly_or_matching_tactics.text: Used a scoped PAD_STACK(0x14) inside un_802FE6A8 around text/color setup after removing broader PAD_STACK(24).
Used explicit casts to short* when passing unsigned-short global fields x6/x8 into un_802FE3F8.
Used an explicit goto found pattern for table lookup in un_802FE918 and un_802FEBE0_OnEnter.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: lookup loops over un_803F9B30 with goto found labels

assembly_or_matching_tactics.text: Masked HSD_GObj_804D784B and HSD_GObj_804D784A with & 0xFF when passing to HSD_GObjObject_80390A70.

review_feedback.text: No human review comments are present in the loaded PR slice.

Automated report records matched-code improvement to 69.20% (+0.03%, +1116 bytes), with new 100% matches for fn_802FE470 and un_802FE6A8, improvements for un_802FE918 and un_802FEBE0_OnEnter, and a .data regression.

follow_up_queries: fn_802FE470 state machine x1 prize cleanup

notes: Strong evidence for changed file, concrete code edits, and automated match/report numbers.
No PR body and no human review comments are available, so author rationale and reviewer intent are not inferred.
The bot report supports function match/improvement and .data regression claims, but the loaded slice does not include build logs, objdiff details, or later fixup discussion.
Tactics such as PAD_STACK, casts, goto shape, and inline wrapper use are observable in the diff; their exact necessity beyond reported matching progress is not independently verified in this slice.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Type recovered global state before expanding dependent logic
accepted_candidate_records.text: In ifprize.c, PR 2538 refined un_803F9D48 from padding/raw fields into typed HSD_JObj/HSD_GObj/HSD_Text and linked-list pointer fields, then used those fields to recover fn_802FE470, un_802FE6A8, and un_802FE918. This is a local example of typed-field recovery enabling readable matching progress.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: recovered uses in fn_802FE470, un_802FE6A8, un_802FE918
bot_report: fn_802FE470 and un_802FE6A8 new matches

accepted_candidate_records.title: Narrow inlining steering can replace broad pragma blocks
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR 2538 removed a dont_inline pragma block around un_802FE3F8 and instead routed the sensitive call in un_802FEBE0_OnEnter through inline wrappers named un_802FE3F8_inner and un_802FE3F8_noinline. The diff comment states this was to avoid un_802FEBE0_OnEnter inlining un_802FE3F8.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: added wrapper functions and call to un_802FE3F8_noinline

accepted_candidate_records.title: Track data regressions even when text functions improve
accepted_candidate_records.text: The automated report for PR 2538 shows two new function matches and two unmatched-function improvements, but also reports a .data regression from 96.59% to 93.59%. Treat such reports as a reminder to review data-section side effects separately from text-section success.

source_update_candidates.title: Inline-wrapper inlining control as a narrow alternative to pragmas
source_update_candidates.text: Consider adding a standards note that, when a specific call-site inlining shape is needed, a narrow wrapper-chain tactic may be preferable to a broad dont_inline pragma block, but should still be justified by objdiff/checkdiff evidence and kept local.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: PR 2538 removes #pragma dont_inline and adds un_802FE3F8_inner/un_802FE3F8_noinline
raw_diff comment: un_802FEBE0_OnEnter will inline un_802FE3F8 otherwise
source_update_candidates.reason: The existing standards warn against broad pragmas and require tactic evidence; this PR provides a concrete pattern that may be useful as a curated example, but the slice lacks full objdiff details.

source_update_candidates.title: ifprize.c owns prize UI state and setup functions
source_update_candidates.text: src/melee/if/ifprize.c contains prize interface state and setup/update functions including fn_802FE470, un_802FE6A8, un_802FE918, and un_802FEBE0_OnEnter, with state stored in un_803F9D48 and resources in un_804D6D98/un_804D6D9C.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: functions and globals in src/melee/if/ifprize.c
source_update_candidates.reason: Potential path-scoped search aid; should be checked against current source before adding as a durable path fact.

rejection_notes: Do not promote the xNN field names as semantic names; the diff keeps offset-style names and does not prove meanings beyond observed types/uses.
Do not claim the .data regression was accepted intentionally; the slice only shows the automated report and merged state, not reviewer rationale.
Do not generalize PAD_STACK(0x14), HSD_GObj_* & 0xFF, or goto found as preferred style; they are observable matching tactics in this PR, not globally validated standards.
